productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men  Marcela Brown Casual Shoes
description: Two tone black leather sneakers from buckaroo with toe cap detail and buckle overlay at the heel collar. The contrasting texture lends this low-top pair an understated sophistication. Wear this with classic denims, a structured blazer and a monochrome tee. Accessorise with a tonal belt and bag.UpperFull grain leather upper with patent leather overlays on the toe box, midfoot and heelBuckle detail on the heel overlayLace-up system for a snug, customized FitLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fitFabric lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole OutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant PU outsole for better shock absorption and gripExaggerated herringbone patterned grooves for tractionSuction point at the heelshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
